title: Update Footer hardcoded 'Aguy Learning Platform' to use i18n brand.*.platformName
body: The Footer component at src/ui/web/footer/Component.tsx line 50 has 'Aguy Learning Platform' hardcoded as a span. This should use the merged i18n messages (brand.platformName) now that the infrastructure exists.
rationale: Keeping brand strings in the brand bundle maintains the separation of concerns this refactor established.

title: Remove unused i18n keys: auth.login.title, auth.login.googleOnlyMessage, shop.footer.platform
body: These three keys were removed from en.json/he.json but their call sites are empty (never used in the codebase). Verify they're not needed before deleting from brand messages.
rationale: Clean up keys that exist in brand messages but are unused in the codebase.
